title: The Passport (Third Amendment) Rules, 1976 (04.10.1976)
text: REGISTERED No. D-(D)-72 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 331] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, OCTOBER 4, 1976/ASVINA 12, 1898 Separate paginal is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 4th October 1976 G. S. R. 831 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 4 of the Passports Act 1967 (15 of 1967), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Passports Rules, 1967, namely :— 1. These rules may be called the Passports (Third Amendment) Rules, 1976. 2. In Schedule I to the Passports Rules, 1967,— (1) for S.No. 7 and the entries relating thereto, the following S. No. shall be substituted, namely :— "7(a) Regional Passport Officer, Madras (Regional The States of Tamil Nadu and Passport and Emigration Officer, Madras). Karnataka and the Union Terri- tory of Pondicherry. (b) Assistant Passport Officer, Madras (Regional Pass- Do. port and Emigration Office, Madras). (c) Public Relations Officer, Madras (Regional Pass- Do." port and Emigration Office, Madras) (2) S. Nos. 9,10 and 11 shall be re-numbered as S. Nos. 10,11 and 12 thereof respectively, and before S. No. 10 so re-numbered, the following S. No. shall be inserted, namely :— "9(a) Regional Passport Office, Hyderabad (Regional The State of Andhra Pradesh. Passport Office, Hyderabad). (b) Assistant Passport Officer, Hyderabad (Regional Do. Passport Office, Hyderabad). (c) Public Relations Officer, Hyderabad (Regional Do." Passport Office, Hyderabad). [No. VI/401/43/76] THOMAS ABRAHAM Aldl. Secy.
